subject: Juan Alexis Tineo-Martinez
summary: 44-year-old Dominican man died Feb 23, 2025 at Centro Medico Hospital, San Juan, PR. **CONTRADICTORY OFFICIAL RECORDS**: ICE claims 2-day detention (Feb 21-23) ending with leg pain complaint and immediate hospital transfer. Puerto Rico Forensic Science Institute NamUS report states he was found in 'boat accident' and died same day - NO mention of ICE custody or 2-day detention. ICE violated transparency policy with 8-day announcement delay. Zero local PR media coverage. Autopsy pending.

key_findings.time_in_custody_disputed: ICE claims 2 days (Feb 21-23), Forensic Institute implies same-day (Feb 23)
key_findings.official_cause: Pending autopsy by Puerto Rico Forensic Science Institute
key_findings.critical_contradiction: ICE version vs. Forensic Institute NamUS report - fundamentally different timelines and circumstances
key_findings.ice_version: 2-day detention, leg pain, immediate 911 call, hospital transfer
key_findings.forensic_version: Boat accident, transported to hospital, died same day - no ICE custody mentioned
key_findings.pattern: Narrative control, delayed announcement (8 days vs required 2), contradictory official records
key_findings.transparency_violation: ICE announced death March 3 (8 days late), violated 2-business-day policy
